text.message: Reds walking away with this if you all keep focussing me
don't think anyone is buying that
i need something other than wood
but hey, blue got himself a really nice setup
no one wanted to offer a card
you ask for a card, that's how it works
i said i need something other than wood
oj said he only got wood
but it was probably too late anyway, this sealed it
doesn't matter, you ask for the card you want for a nb
either way, was always the 8 wood
anyway, just put us out of our misery, blue, gg
It was blocked for a long time and I needed to pop to take army
i wouldve traded you the sheep
Well blocking 8 is a mistake noe
was auto-piloting a bit since I have no shot
hes trying to pull for win
blue takes army back and goes to 8
